summary: Color-graded video, dark throughout, of U.S. Border Patrol Special Operations Group agents handling rifles and night-vision gear, moving through a red-lit doorway, and standing silhouetted against an orange and purple sunset sky. The Proverbs 28:1 verse text recurs: 'THE WICKED FLEE WHEN NO MAN PURSUETH; BUT THE RIGHTEOUS ARE BOLD AS A LION.'

script.scene: Near-black frame: a gloved hand holds a suppressed rifle in faint blue-grey light. Text fades in: 'THE WICKED FLEE WHEN NO MAN PURSUETH'.
Silhouette of an agent in a helmet and night-vision mount in a dim interior. Full verse shown: 'THE WICKED FLEE WHEN NO MAN PURSUETH; BUT THE RIGHTEOUS ARE BOLD AS A LION.' -PROVERBS 28:1.
Two agents move through a doorway glowing deep red, backlit, with deep shadows; verse overlay continues.
Agents silhouetted against an orange and purple sunset sky, shot from a low camera angle; verse overlay continues.
Rear silhouette of an agent with night-vision gear and a rifle walking down a dim street toward a lit doorway; verse overlay remains.

notable_text: "THE WICKED FLEE WHEN NO MAN PURSUETH; BUT THE RIGHTEOUS ARE BOLD AS A LION." -PROVERBS 28:1; (tweet) TO EVERY CRIMINAL ILLEGAL ALIEN IN AMERICA: Darkness is no longer your ally... US Border Patrol's Special Operations Group will stop at nothing to hunt you down.
